zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Derham于1378年出生在英国諾福爾可格亞特 可雷辛加姆时，她的父亲Thomas Derham38岁，母亲Miss Schardelow31岁。她于1399年与William De Dethick III在英国諾福爾可格亞特 可雷辛加姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Derham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Dearham in Cumbria, East and West Dereham in Norfolk, or Dyrham in Gloucestershire, named from Old English dēor ‘deer’ + hām ‘settlement, homestead’, or hamm ‘enclosed land, water meadow’.
Irish (mainly Dublin, Drogheda, and Cork): of English origin, but MacLysaght takes this to be a variant of   Durham  .

variants.name: Durham
meanings: habitational name from the city of Durham, recorded as Dunholm in 1056 and Duram in 1297, named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ (see Down 1) + late Old English holm (from Old Norse holmr ‘island’).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Derham was born in 1378, in Great Cressingham, Norfolk, England, her father, Thomas Derham, was 38 and her mother, Miss Schardelow, was 31. She married William De Dethick III in 1399, in Great Cressingham, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Derham est née en 1378, à Great Cressingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Derham, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Miss Schardelow, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé William De Dethick III en 1399, à Great Cressingham, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Derham 1378 in Great Cressingham, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Derham 38 und ihre Mutter Miss Schardelow 31. Sie hat 1399 in Great Cressingham, Norfolk, England William De Dethick III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Derham è nata il nel 1378 nel Great Cressingham, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Thomas Derham, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Miss Schardelow, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato William De Dethick III nel 1399, nel Great Cressingham, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Derhamが1378年にイギリスノーフォルクグレアト クレシンガムで生まれた時，父Thomas Derhamは38歳，母Miss Schardelowは31歳であった。1399年にイギリスノーフォルクグレアト クレシンガムでWilliam De Dethick IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Derham(이)가 1378년 영국 노르폴크 그리트 크레징함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Derham(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Miss Schardelow(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1399년 영국 노르폴크 그리트 크레징함에서 William De Dethick III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Derham nasceu em 1378, em Great Cressingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Derham, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Miss Schardelow, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com William De Dethick III em 1399, em Great Cressingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Derham родилась в 1378 г. в местности грит крессингхам, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Derham было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Miss Schardelow, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William De Dethick III в 1399 г. в местности грит крессингхам, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Derham nació en 1378, en Great Cressingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Derham, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Miss Schardelow, tenía 31 años. Se casó con William De Dethick III en 1399, en Great Cressingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija.
